verses.text: Tua ahih manin Khrih thu a kipat cilna lelte nusia-in a thuthuk zawte ngaihsutin nei ni. Bangmahin a kimanglo nasepnate nusiat ding, Pasian upna thu
tuiphumna leh khut ngakna thu, misite thawhkikna leh tawntung gimthuakna, cih thute genpha sansan nawn kei ni
Eite in mainawt ni. Pasian in hong thukimpih ahih nak leh i mainawt ding ahi hi
A tawpkik khinsate a kisik kikna dingin kibawl zolo hi. Pasian' khuavak sungah amaute om khinin, vantung nopna ciam khinin, Kha Siangtho ngah khinin
Pasian' thu a hoihna phawk khinin, a hong tungding vangliatna thu zong thei khin uh ahih manin
amaute a tawpkik leh, amau utthu tawh singlamteh tungah Pasian' Tapa thatkikin a zumhuai dingin a pholak kikkik suak uh ahih manin a kisik theihna ding uh lampi om nawnlo hi
A tungah a kia guahtuite hupin, a kikhawhsak mite-a' dingin a kimang thei kungte a khangsak leitang pen Pasian in thupha a pia hi
Ahi zongin tua leitang in lingkungte leh sialtalling kungte hong posak leh Pasian in samsia-in, mei tawh kihaltum ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: I Lamet Hong Tung Taktak Ding

verses.text: Lawm itte aw, hih bangin thu i gen hangin note ka hong muang mahmah uh a, hotkhiatna tawh kizomin thupha a hoihzaw ngah taktak uh hi, ci-in ka hong ngaihsun uh hi

Pasian, a manloin gamta ngeilo ahih manin na Khristianpihte uh a beisa hunah na huhna uh leh tudongin na huh laina uh tawh ama-a' dingin na nasepna uh leh amah na itna uh na lahnate uh hong mangngilh hetlo ding hi
Note khat ciat' lametna thu hong tun' taktak theihna dingin a tawp dongin lawpin na thanop paisuakna ding uh ka hong deihsak pha uh hi
Note thadah loin upna leh lungduaina a nei mite bangin, Pasian' hong ciamsa thu na ngahna dingun ka hong deihsak uh hi
Pasian in Abraham' tungah thu a ciam ciangin a tun'sak takpi ding bek thu a ciam hi. Thu a ciam ciangin zong amah sangin a lianzaw kuamah om nawnlo ahih manin ama min tawh thu ciam a
“Nang thupha hong pia-in suanlekhak tampi a nei dingin ka hong ciam hi,” a ci hi
Abraham in lungduai takin na ngak ahih manin Pasian' thuciam a ngah hi
Mi khat peuhpeuh in thu a ciam ciangin amah sangin a lianzaw khat' min tawh kiciam ahih manin, thu kituhnate-ah tua thuciamna pen a tawpna hita hi
Pasian in ama geelnasa a kheel ngei hetlo ding ahihna thu a thuciamna a ngahding mite tungah teltakin theisak nuam ahih manin a thuciam banah kiciamna khat a bawl lai hi

Tua hi a, a kikheel theilo thu nih kithuap ahih manin Pasian in zuau gen theilo ding hi. Tua hi a, amah a beel eite in eite mai-ah hong kikoih lametna thu kiptakin i letcipna dingin i tha hong nuamsak hi
I lungsim a hong kipsak dingin tu-a bang lametna a nei ihi hi. Tua i lametna kician mahmah a, vantung biakinn siangtho tawngnung sung ciangdong tung khinta hi
Tua lai munah eite' tangin Jesuh na ma tun' khinta a, siampi Melkhizedek gui zui-in a om tawntung ding siampi lianpen a suak hi.
